# Smesh.Dev - Custom Automation, Web and AI Agency

Smesh.Dev is a development studio focused on workflow automation with n8n, custom web development with Astro and Next.js, WhatsApp order systems, and knowledge-based customer support chatbots.

## Contact Information
- **Owner:** Haider Ali
- **WhatsApp:** +923422222752
- **Email:** ali.kwl@live.com
- **Website:** https://smesh.dev

## Core Architecture & Pages
- **Home:** https://smesh.dev/
- **Services:** https://smesh.dev/services/
- **Portfolio Case Studies:** https://smesh.dev/portfolio/
- **Interactive Demos:** https://smesh.dev/demos/
- **Pricing Packages:** https://smesh.dev/pricing/
- **About Smesh.Dev:** https://smesh.dev/about/
- **Contact:** https://smesh.dev/contact/
- **Blog:** https://smesh.dev/blog/

## Core Services
1. **WhatsApp Automation:** Auto-reply ordering bots for local shops in Pakistan.
2. **AI Support Chatbots:** Knowledge-grounded Q&A bots utilizing RAG (Supabase Vector DB).
3. **Appointment Booking Systems:** Automated schedules integrated with Google Calendar.
4. **Point of Sale (POS) & Inventory:** Fast custom retail POS panels.
5. **SaaS MVP Sprints:** Rapid boilerplate Next.js + Supabase + Stripe setups for founders.
6. **Workflow Automation:** Multi-app n8n pipelines (Notion, Slack, Stripe, Gmail).
7. **Business Websites:** Lightweight, high-speed marketing and business websites.
8. **SEO & AEO Audits:** Optimization for search crawlers and AI search engines (GEO).
